inventoryOps.title: Inventory Locator
inventoryOps.subtitle: Search a part or scan a pallet to see every bin it's stored in - live from ERPNext.
inventoryOps.searchPlaceholder: Search by part, name, or pallet code (e.g. Trio A or K7P9)...
inventoryOps.scanHint: Point the camera at the QR code on the pallet label.
inventoryOps.zoomHint: Pinch or use the slider to zoom.
inventoryOps.palletsTruncated: Pallet ids shown for the top items only (large bin).
inventoryOps.fullReportHint: Download the entire inventory as a spreadsheet, with tabs grouped by bin and by product.
inventoryOps.partsTruncated: Showing the first 500 — keep typing to narrow.
inventoryOps.transferScanPlaceholder: Scan or type a pallet ID, then Enter...
inventoryOps.transferQueueEmpty: Scan or type pallet IDs to queue them for transfer.
inventoryOps.transferSplit: split across bins — consolidate in ERPNext first
inventoryOps.stageScanPlaceholder: Scan or type a pallet ID, then Enter...
inventoryOps.stageQueueEmpty: Scan or type pallet IDs to queue them for staging.
inventoryOps.stageDifferentItem: different part than the queue — stage one part at a time
inventoryOps.stagePickOrder: Pick an order to reserve to
inventoryOps.stageNoOrders: No open orders need this part.
inventoryOps.scanDenied: Camera access was blocked. Allow camera access in your browser settings, then try again.

inventoryOps.scanError: Could not start the camera. Try again.
inventoryOps.noAccess: You don't have access to this page.
inventoryOps.searchPart: Search a part number or name...
inventoryOps.addMissing: Pick a part, quantity, bin and printer.
inventoryOps.confirmDeleteMsg: This will remove this stock from inventory. This can be undone from Recently deleted labels, but creates extra work. Continue?
inventoryOps.confirmReprintMsg: Reprinting voids the current label and prints a new one with a new pallet code. The old printed label must be discarded. Continue?
inventoryOps.noPallets: No labeled pallets for this part yet. The stock above isn't on a tracked pallet - add one with Add Inventory.
inventoryOps.palletsError: Couldn't load pallets - tap to retry.
inventoryOps.palletSuperseded: This pallet has no active stock - it may have been removed or superseded by a reprint.
inventoryOps.supersededCurrent: which was superseded by a reprint or quantity change. Showing the current label
inventoryOps.supersededGone: which is no longer active (it was removed or fully superseded).
inventoryOps.restoreNewLabelNote: This quantity differs from the label, so a NEW label will be created (a new pallet code).
inventoryOps.restoreNewLabelConfirm: This quantity is different from the original label, so a new label with a new pallet code will be created. Continue?
inventoryOps.restoreBinRequired: Choose the bin to return the pallet to.
inventoryOps.qtyModeHint: This product is not serialized - it is tracked by quantity. Move or remove boxes from any bin.
inventoryOps.qtySameBin: Source and destination bins are the same.
inventoryOps.searchSalesOrder: Search sales orders for this part...
inventoryOps.noSalesOrders: No open sales orders for this part
